original:
All of the ships in your fleet are at dangerously low combat readiness (below 20%).

Deploying these ships in combat is likely to cause critical malfunctions - dealing damage, disabling some weapons and engines for the duration of the battle, and causing further critical malfunctions during the deployment.

It's recommended that you let your fleet recover before engaging in combat. Ships regain combat readiness over time, and friendly stations offer a quick way to do so and effect repairs, as well as hire on additional crew if needed.

You can check the combat readiness levels of your ships in the fleet screen.
translation:
舰队中的所有舰船战备值 (CR) 过低 (低于20%)。

把这些船部署至战场可能会引发严重故障。严重故障将造成船体损伤，使武器和引擎在战斗期间失效，并在部署期间造成更多的严重故障。

建议等它们恢复一段时间后再投入战斗。你也可以在空间站内快速恢复，如果船员不足请雇佣足够的数量。

你可以在舰队面板里查看战备状态。

版本：0.98-RC8 词条格式：v2
源文件：data\strings\strings.json
数据路径：$.campaignHelp.chmAllCritCR_text

original:
You can select which ships to deploy at the beginning of each battle, and deploy reinforcements as the battle goes on.

Deploying a ship reduces its combat readiness by a fixed amount. In addition, ships will begin to gradually lose combat readiness after their peak readiness time runs out.

Recovering combat readiness takes time and consumes valuable supplies.
translation:
你可以在每场战斗开始时选择部署哪些船只参战，并在战斗进行时部署援军。

部署舰船参战将在战后扣除战备值 (CR)。此外，舰船在峰值时间耗尽后，其战备值 (CR) 将会开始下降。

恢复战备值 (CR) 需要时间，并消耗宝贵的补给。

original:
Some of the ships marked for deployment are at dangerously low combat readiness (below 20%).

Bringing the systems on these ships to combat power levels is likely to cause critical malfunctions - dealing damage, disabling some weapons and engines for the duration of the battle, and causing further critical malfunctions during the deployment.

Running these risks - which include the outright destruction of a ship - is usually a measure of last resort.
translation:
一些准备部署的舰船正处于危险的低战备状态 (低于20%)。

将这些舰艇上的系统出力提升到战斗水平很可能会引发严重故障。严重故障将造成船体损害，使武器和引擎在战斗期间失效，并在部署期间造成更多的严重故障。

很可能会导致舰船被彻底摧毁 - 除非这是你最后的手段，否则请不要部署它们。

original:
Your fleet is running low on supplies.

If it runs out of supplies, all repairs will stop and ships will start to lose combat readiness over time. After more than a couple of days without supplies, the fleet begins to run the risk of accidents that range from minor (such as the loss of some cargo) to critical (losing a ship).

It's recommended that you acquire more supplies as quickly as possible.

To reduce supply consumption, you can suspend any ongoing ship repairs. A last resort way to get more supplies is to scuttle one of your ships.

The commands to do so are available on the fleet screen.
translation:
补给不足。

如果舰队补给耗尽，所有的维修都会停止，舰船也会随时间推移开始失去战备值 (CR)。在持续多日没有补给的情况下，舰队就会面临发生意外的风险，从轻微的{(如损失一些货物) 直至严重的 (损失一艘船)。

建议你尽快获取更多的补给。

为减少补给消耗，你可暂停任何正在进行的船只维修。获得补给品的最终方法是将你的一艘船进行自毁。

你可以通过舰队面板暂停船只维修或自毁舰船。

original:
Welcome to the Starsector campaign!

Since you're playing in iron mode, you'll only be able to save the game when you exit, and won't be able to load another game without exiting (and saving) your current game first.

Try to avoid taking on fleets much bigger than yours, or ones that have bigger ships, and please remember that it's a work-in-progress so bugs will occasionally happen.

Good luck!
translation:
欢迎来到 starsector 的生涯模式！ 

当前为铁人模式，你只能在退出游戏时保存进度，并且不能在游戏进行时读档。

尽量避免招惹比你规模更大、或拥有大型战舰的舰队。请记住，这是款正在开发的游戏，所以难免会有 bug。

祝你好运！

It's recommended that you let these ships recover before using them in combat. Ships regain combat readiness over time, and friendly stations offer a quick way to do so and effect repairs, as well as hire on additional crew if needed.

You can check the combat readiness levels of your ships in the fleet screen.
translation:
部分舰船战备值 (CR) 过低 (低于40%)。

此后它们会暂时性地发生武器或引擎故障。

建议等它们恢复一段时间后再投入战斗。你也可以在空间站内快速恢复，如果船员不足请雇佣足够的数量。

你可以在舰队面板里查看战备状态。
